Lines.Description: If Test bit AnimFlag_AutoFlipRight on actor_animationflags ELSE GOTO 00000148
If Test bit AnimFlag_AutoFlipLeft on actor_animationflags ELSE GOTO 00000256
If block_x == math_x2 AND block_y == math_y2 ELSE GOTO 00000702
Print 'Runtime Error: no loaded talkpad' on quit
If forcefadeout == false AND level is not zero AND brightness < fadetime ELSE GOTO 00000880
If actor_type is not zero ELSE GOTO 00001042
If actor_spawnerid == newvalue AND actor_uniqueid != newvalue ELSE GOTO 00001316
Print 'Runtime Error: Bad teleporter' on quit
If teleport is not zero ELSE GOTO 00001638
If level is not zero ELSE GOTO 00001746
If level is not zero ELSE GOTO 00001822
If camera_x < Player_X / XRes * XRes ELSE GOTO 00001992
If camera_x > Player_X / XRes * XRes ELSE GOTO 00002064
If camera_y < Player_y / yres * yres ELSE GOTO 00002134
If camera_y > Player_y / yres * yres ELSE GOTO 00002204
If Test bit actor_lookdir on lookmask_left
If Test bit actor_lookdir on lookmask_right ELSE GOTO 00002326
If Test bit actor_lookdir on lookmask_left
If Test bit actor_lookdir on lookmask_right ELSE GOTO 00002468
If Test bit actor_lookdir on lookmask_up
If Test bit actor_lookdir on lookmask_down ELSE GOTO 00002604
If Test bit actor_lookdir on lookmask_up
If Test bit actor_lookdir on lookmask_down ELSE GOTO 00002766
Print 'Error: Level needs to be at least as tall as the current Y Resolution value {yres}' on quit
If teleport is not zero ELSE GOTO 00003848
If teleport is not zero ELSE GOTO 00003848
If audiodriver == audiodriver_ptplayer OR audiodriver == audiodriver_mdsdrv ELSE GOTO 00004044
If level is not zero ELSE GOTO 00004416
If newvalue is not zero ELSE GOTO 00004460
If newvalue is not zero ELSE GOTO 00004556
If newvalue is not zero ELSE GOTO 00004702
If Test bit cd32_play on control1_buttons ELSE GOTO 00004780
If true is not zero ELSE GOTO 00004886
If Test bit cd32_play on control1_buttons ELSE GOTO 00004880
If music is not zero ELSE GOTO 00005132
Print 'Too much RAM used ({chipram} bytes). Consider reducing max active actors or largest map size.' on quit
If isntsc is not zero ELSE GOTO 00005378
If level is not zero ELSE GOTO 00006038
Print 'Cannot change yres while level loaded' on quit
If actor_x >= camera_x + XRes ELSE GOTO 00006188
If actor_y >= camera_y + yres ELSE GOTO 00006256
If panel is not zero ELSE GOTO 00006646
If level is not zero ELSE GOTO 00006646
If panel_bottom is not zero ELSE GOTO 00006688
If panel_top is not zero ELSE GOTO 00006738
If control1_buttons & mask_truebuttons is not zero ELSE GOTO 00007066
If control1_buttons is not zero ELSE GOTO 00007212
If actor_y >= camera_y + yres + 16 ELSE GOTO 00007336
If actor_x >= camera_x + xres + 16 ELSE GOTO 00007484
If Test bit AnimFlag_PreventAttack on actor_animationflags ELSE GOTO 00008048
If Test bit Flag_AutoFire on actor_controlattackcontrols is zero ELSE GOTO 00008160
Print 'Thank you for playing' on quit
If teleport is not zero ELSE GOTO 00008978
Say 'Don't go anywhere without your shield'
If teleport is not zero ELSE GOTO 00009302

Say 'You found a sword!!!

You can now fight monsters.'

Say 'You found a shield!!!

Your defence rises by one point.'

Say 'N: Link's Home
W: Hyrule Field
E: Forest Temple'
Say 'The Kingdom of Hyrule has been in peace since Link, the last knight of Hyrule, had defeated the malicious Ganon and reclaimed the precious triforce from him.'
Say 'Nobody knows what Link's wish to the triforce was, but it had the effect of reunifying the Light and Dark world, and awakening the 7 wise men's descendants.'

Say 'Next, Link handed the Triforce and Master Sword over to Princess Zelda, and people started to believe that peace would last.<5>
But the people were wrong<3>.<3>.<3>.'
Say 'Unfortunately, Link's wish also had negative effects. Ganon and his henchmen were resurrected and got ready to attack.'

Say 'Somewhere in Hyrule Forest, Link is sleeping without suspecting that Ganon has already moved into attack.
<5>Until<3>.<3>.<3>.'
Yield on  timer to  next line

Say 'Help me!<5>
Help me!<5>
It's me,<2> Zelda!<3>
I'm talking to you by telepathy.'
Say 'I am a prisoner in the dungeon of the castle!'
Say 'Ganon is back, and he surely has already found the Triforce<3>.<3>.<3>.'
Say 'Come quickly to the castle Link, you are my only hope<3>.<3>.<3>.'
